task_completion.description: Load the Exam Anxiety dataset into JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP application window is open and displays the data from 'ExamAnxiety.csv' (columns like Revise, Exam, Anxiety should be visible).

task_completion.description: Specify the SEM path model using lavaan syntax
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP SEM or Path Analysis module is open with lavaan syntax visible. The syntax must include 'Anxiety ~ Revise' and 'Exam ~ Anxiety'.

task_completion.description: Select required analysis outputs (Standardized estimates, R-squared, Path diagram)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP SEM options panel, checkboxes or settings for 'Standardized estimates', 'R-squared', and 'Path diagram' (or 'Model plot') are checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Generate and display the analysis results including the path diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP results panel displays the SEM output tables (including Chi-square test, parameter estimates, R-squared) and a visual path diagram showing the specified relationships.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP analysis file to the specified location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the JASP window title indicates the file is being saved as 'Exam_Path_Model.jasp' in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the Model Fit Report text file with the p-value and conclusion
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'Model_Fit_Report.txt' containing the Chi-square p-value (approx 0.176) and a one-sentence conclusion stating the model has a 'good fit'.

integrity.description: Agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP application windows, menus, and result panels, rather than just terminal commands or R scripts.

integrity.description: The reported p-value matches the actual analysis output
integrity.visual_evidence: The p-value written in 'Model_Fit_Report.txt' matches the Chi-square p-value visible in the JASP results panel.

integrity.description: The agent did not include the forbidden direct path in the model
integrity.visual_evidence: The lavaan syntax in the JASP SEM module does NOT contain 'Exam ~ Revise', and the generated path diagram does not show a direct arrow from Revise to Exam.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct SEM model syntax requires 'Anxiety ~ Revise' and 'Exam ~ Anxiety', and must NOT include 'Exam ~ Revise'. The expected Chi-square p-value is approximately 0.176. Since 0.176 > 0.05, the correct conclusion in the report is that the restricted model has a 'good fit' to the data. The JASP file must be saved as 'Exam_Path_Model.jasp' and the report as 'Model_Fit_Report.txt' in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/.
